Header.about_desc: Our mission and how Iconrev works

Footer.tagline: Built for local businesses that want to win on Google Maps. 1,200+ locations use Iconrev to collect reviews the easy way.
Footer.reply_time: We reply within 2 hours on business days

Hero.headline: Your competitors are stacking Google reviews.
Hero.subtext: One physical card your customers actually see: NFC + QR, a clear ask, and a direct path to your Google review screen. Less friction — more five-star reviews.

HowItWorks.title: Setup Your Stand in 3 Easy Steps
HowItWorks.subtitle: A clean setup flow your staff can explain in 10 seconds.
HowItWorks.step1_desc: When your stand arrives, scan the QR code to start the setup in seconds.
HowItWorks.step2_desc: Open the setup flow, enter your activation details, and connect your Google review link.
HowItWorks.step3_desc: That's it. Your stand keeps generating reviews while your team focuses on service.

Features.label: Why Iconrev
Features.title: Everything you need to win local search on Google
Features.subtitle: No complicated software, no hidden subscription. One physical card working for you around the clock.
Features.f1_desc: Most teams go from a handful of reviews to dozens in weeks. Each review moves you closer to the Google Maps top three — where most local clicks happen.
Features.f2_desc: No app, no account, no hunting for your listing. One tap or scan lands them on your review screen. Many businesses see review conversion jump from ~2% to ~30%.
Features.f3_desc: Tap with a phone or scan the QR — both work. iPhone and Android. No customer left behind, no excuse not to leave a review.
Features.f4_desc: One new customer from better visibility can cover the card. Many teams see strong ROI in the first month.
Features.f5_desc: No more homemade signs. A polished card matches your brand and makes leaving a review feel natural.
Features.f6_desc: Try it risk-free. If you are not seeing momentum in the first month, we refund you — no hassle.

Testimonials.label: Real results
Testimonials.title: 1,200+ businesses trust Iconrev
Testimonials.subtitle: Restaurants, salons, shops, trades — same pattern: more reviews, more foot traffic, more revenue.
Testimonials.t1_quote: Before Iconrev I had 12 reviews in three years. Six weeks with the card: 48 new ones. I went from 8th to 2nd on Google Maps. Revenue was up about 25% the next month.
Testimonials.t2_quote: Guests love it. They scan on the way out and leave a review on the spot. I stopped chasing people. In three months: 91 new reviews and our rating went from 4.2 to 4.8.
Testimonials.t3_quote: I thought Google reviews were mostly for restaurants. For a shop it might be even bigger. Competitors had ~15 reviews; I am at 67. People find me first and trust me faster.
Testimonials.t4_quote: The card has sat on the counter for four months: 112 Google reviews, highest rating in the neighborhood, and tourists who say they found us on Maps. Paid for itself in a week.

CTA.badge: Limited offer: 20% off with code LAUNCH20
CTA.title: While you read this, competitors are collecting reviews
CTA.subtitle: Every day without fresh reviews is a day Google ranks you lower. Order today — cards ship in 2–3 business days and start working immediately.

Home.pack_desc: Same flow as the product page: pick a pack, then tell us which location it's for so we can prepare your order with the right Google profile.

Products.label: NFC + QR review cards
Products.title: Choose your pack
Products.subtitle: Pick a pack, then tell us which business it's for — we'll use that profile when we prepare your cards.
Products.location_desc: This lets us match the right Google profile before we ship. You can update it in the cart if needed.
Products.inspiration_title: Where to put your Google review stand
Products.inspiration_desc: A few placement ideas — counter, desk, table, and more. The first image shows our card in a real checkout context; the others suggest typical spots (stock photos). Adapt to your layout.
Products.inspiration_img_alt: example placement for a Google review stand
Products.inspiration_note: Illustration only where noted — other photos are mood/context examples, not your exact product in that location.

GoogleBusinessLocation.title: Your Google Business location
GoogleBusinessLocation.desc: Tell us which Google Business Profile this order is for. We use it to link the correct review URL when we prepare your cards — setup is handled by our team after purchase, not in this form.
GoogleBusinessLocation.placeholder: Search your business on Google Maps...
GoogleBusinessLocation.custom_label: Or enter a custom business name

About.title: We built the product we wished we had for our own business
About.subtitle: Iconrev started with a simple frustration: why is it so hard to turn happy customers into Google reviews?
About.story_p1: In 2023, after years running a local restaurant, our founder saw the same pattern: guests loved the place, but only about 2% left a review. Why? The path was too long — open Maps, find the business, hunt for the review button. Most people give up.
About.story_p1_strong: guests loved the place, but only about 2% left a review
About.story_p2: The fix was obvious: remove the friction. One card on the counter. Tap or scan. Land straight on the review screen. For many teams, that turned ~2% into ~28% completion.
About.story_p3_suffix: use Iconrev — restaurants, salons, shops, trades. Same outcome: more reviews, stronger ratings, better Maps visibility, more customers. Our mission: help every local business compete on Google like the big brands.
About.v1_desc: Roughly three in four people never scroll past the top three on Maps. We help you get there.
About.v2_desc: No customer app, no staff workshop. If you can place a card on a counter, you can use Iconrev.
About.v3_desc: One new customer from better visibility can pay for the card. Many teams see strong payback in the first month.
About.quotes_title: What we hear most from customers
About.q1: I didn't think reviews could move revenue this much.
About.q2: In six weeks I had more reviews than my competitor who's been there ten years.
About.q3: The hardest part was trying it once. After that it runs itself.
About.q4: The card paid for itself in the first week.

Contact.title: Let's talk about your visibility
Contact.subtitle: Questions or tailored advice? Our team replies within about 2 hours on business days.
Contact.audit_desc: Send us your business name and we'll reply with a quick audit: review count, rating, Maps positioning, and improvement tips.
Contact.location_sub: We ship across the US & more
Contact.form_hint: Include your business name if you'd like the free audit.
Contact.message_placeholder: Tell us about your business and what you need. Mention your business name for a free audit.
Contact.alert_success: Thanks! We'll get back to you within 2 business hours.

Chat.title: Need help?
Chat.bot_welcome: Hi! 👋 Questions about our NFC + QR review cards? I can help you get more Google reviews — or ask for a free profile audit.
Chat.bot_reply: Thanks for reaching out! Our team replies within ~2 hours on business days. Meanwhile, many customers see 3× more Google reviews with Iconrev — cards start at €29.00, or email contact@iconrev.com anytime.
